name: ava-railway-backend

scripts.check: node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/deploy-doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/apply-migration.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-env.mjs

description: Ava Railway backend with live-proof, visual-status, fast supervisor runtime, owner gates, Postgres migration support, and deployment proof routes. Includes verified-source teaching core and public-safe ArchE backup protocol.
